name: PATCH /api/leads/:id - Advance a captured lead's stage
description: Operator status-tracking endpoint behind the admin-cockpit Lead Detail screen. Updates the lead's stage to one of the LeadStage enum values and bumps updated_at via the repository. Payload validated by LeadUpdateRequestSchema (zod) — invalid stage values 400 with the field name in the envelope.

testCases.name: Mark a captured lead as qualified
